content:
Saturn in Scorpio: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Saturn in Scorpio blends the archetypal drive of Saturn (where you face discipline, responsibility, and long-term mastery) with the Water, fixed nature of Scorpio.

  • Planet: Saturn — structure, discipline, responsibility, limitation, mastery
  • Sign: Scorpio (Water/Fixed) — intensity, transformation, depth, passion, power

Eastern Perspective
